description: Clean the dirty Libstar product catalog: normalise prices/dates/booleans/units, resolve brand + legacy categories via lookup, dedupe product_ids, quarantine invalid rows.

scriptLines: brand_key = case(!in(['null','unknown',''], lower(replace(trim(brand), ' and ', ' & '))), lower(replace(trim(brand), ' and ', ' & '))),
active_c = case(in(['Y','1','TRUE','YES','ACTIVE'], upper(trim(is_active))), true(), in(['N','0','FALSE','NO'], upper(trim(is_active))), false()),

channel_c = case(lower(trim(sales_channel)) == 'retail and wholesale', 'Retail and wholesale', lower(trim(sales_channel)) == 'food service', 'Food service', lower(trim(sales_channel)) == 'industrial and contract manufacturing', 'Industrial and contract manufacturing', lower(trim(sales_channel)) == 'export', 'Export'),

province_c = case(in(['western cape','wc'], lower(trim(province))), 'Western Cape', in(['gauteng','gp'], lower(trim(province))), 'Gauteng', in(['kwazulu-natal','kzn'], lower(trim(province))), 'KwaZulu-Natal', in(['eastern cape','ec'], lower(trim(province))), 'Eastern Cape', in(['mpumalanga','mp'], lower(trim(province))), 'Mpumalanga', in(['limpopo','lp'], lower(trim(province))), 'Limpopo', in(['north west','nw'], lower(trim(province))), 'North West', in(['free state','fs'], lower(trim(province))), 'Free State', in(['northern cape','nc'], lower(trim(province))), 'Northern Cape'),

category_mapped = case(lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'dairy', 'Dairy', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'convenience meals', 'Convenience Meals', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'value-added meats', 'Value-added Meats', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'baby', 'Baby', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'fresh mushrooms', 'Fresh Mushrooms', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'dry condiments', 'Dry condiments', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'wet condiments', 'Wet condiments', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'meal ingredients', 'Meal ingredients', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'baking', 'Baking', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'snacking', 'Snacking', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'spreads', 'Spreads', lower(replace(trim(category), ' and ', ' & ')) == 'beverages', 'Beverages')) ~> dcln

drvFinal derive(product_group = case(in(['Dairy','Convenience Meals','Value-added Meats','Baby','Fresh Mushrooms'], category_final), 'Perishable products', !isNull(category_final), 'Ambient products'),

reject_reason = concat(iif(isNull(pid) || pid == '', 'missing_id;', ''), iif(isNull(price_c) || price_c <= 0, 'bad_price;', ''), iif(isNull(date_c), 'bad_date;', ''), iif(isNull(brand_final), 'unknown_brand;', ''), iif(isNull(category_final), 'unknown_category;', '')),
is_valid = !(isNull(pid) || pid == '' || isNull(price_c) || price_c <= 0 || isNull(date_c) || isNull(brand_final) || isNull(category_final))) ~> drvFlag
